svg.title: Frame journey with token conversion, GPU attention, and token decoding steps
svg.text: The journey of a frame — into the model's data center and back
2. Your app sends the frame to the model's data center
What each guard checks — and what runs it
— HTTP gateway byte check. No tokenising. Looks at raw Content-Length. → 413
— Rate limiter. Counts requests and tokens per time window. → 429
— CPU tokeniser (not GPU). Counts tokens against the model's context window. → 400
All three guards fire before the GPU. Any rejection = 0 tokens billed.
3. Reference — which guard fires which code
passed all three guards — the model ran on GPU and replied
